context: Evaluates whether the AI provider is correctly configured using @ai-sdk/openai-compatible with environment-variable-driven base URL, API key, and model names. Checks that two model exports exist and that defaults are applied when environment variables are absent.

checklist.name: createOpenAICompatible usage
checklist.description: The `createOpenAICompatible` function from `@ai-sdk/openai-compatible` is called with `baseURL` and `apiKey` sourced from the correct environment variables.

checklist.name: globalModel export
checklist.description: A `globalModel` is exported, created by calling the provider with the model ID from `process.env.AI_GLOBAL_MODEL`.

checklist.name: attachmentModel export
checklist.description: An `attachmentModel` is exported, created by calling the provider with the model ID from `process.env.AI_ATTACHMENT_MODEL`.

checklist.name: Default fallbacks
checklist.description: Both model IDs fall back to a non-empty default string when the corresponding environment variable is not set.

checklist.name: Module structure
checklist.description: The provider is created once at module level (not inside a function) and models are exported as named exports.
